ModeS_ADSB_Record.name: ModeS_ADSB_Record

ts.description: The timestamp of the message reception in milliseconds since the epoch. Required.

icao.description: The ICAO 24-bit address of the aircraft. Required.

df.description: The Downlink Format (DF) of the Mode-S message, indicating the message category. Required.

tc.description: The Type Code (TC) of the ADS-B message. Present for DF17 and DF18 messages; null otherwise.

bcode.description: The BDS (Comm-B Data Selector) code. Present for DF20 and DF21 messages; null otherwise.

alt.description: Barometric altitude in feet. Present for certain BDS and ADS-B messages; null otherwise.

cs.description: Aircraft identification (call sign). Present for BDS20 and some ADS-B messages; null otherwise.

sq.description: Transponder code (Squawk). Present for BDS17 messages; null otherwise.

lat.description: Latitude in degrees. Present for ADS-B position messages; null otherwise.

lon.description: Longitude in degrees. Present for ADS-B position messages; null otherwise.

spd.description: Speed in knots. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

ang.description: Angle in degrees. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

vr.description: Vertical rate in ft/min. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

spd_type.description: Speed type. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

dir_src.description: Direction source. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

vr_src.description: Vertical rate source. Present for ADS-B TC19 messages; null otherwise.

ws.description: Wind speed in knots. Present for BDS44 messages; null otherwise.

wd.description: Wind direction in degrees. Present for BDS44 messages; null otherwise.

at.description: Air temperature in degrees Celsius. Present for BDS44/BDS45 messages; null otherwise.

ap.description: Air pressure in hPa. Present for BDS44/BDS45 messages; null otherwise.

hm.description: Relative humidity in percentage. Present for BDS44 messages; null otherwise.

roll.description: Aircraft roll angle in degrees. Present for BDS50 messages; null otherwise.

trak.description: True track angle in degrees. Present for BDS50 messages; null otherwise.

gs.description: Ground speed in knots. Present for BDS50 messages; null otherwise.

tas.description: True airspeed in knots. Present for BDS50 messages; null otherwise.

hd.description: Aircraft heading in degrees. Present for BDS60 messages; null otherwise.

ias.description: Indicated airspeed in knots. Present for BDS60 messages; null otherwise.

m.description: Mach number. Present for BDS60 messages; null otherwise.

vrb.description: Vertical rate based on barometric altitude in ft/min. Present for BDS60 messages; null otherwise.

vri.description: Vertical rate based on inertial navigation system in ft/min. Present for BDS60 messages; null otherwise.

rssi.description: Received Signal Strength Indicator in dBFS. Present for all messages if available; null otherwise.

emst.description: Emergency or priority status. Present for ADS-B TC28; null otherwise.

tgt.description: Target state info. Present for certain BDS6,2 or ADS-B TC29; null otherwise.

opst.description: Operational status info. Present for certain BDS6,5 or ADS-B TC31; null otherwise.

ModeS_ADSB_Record.description: A comprehensive schema for Mode-S and ADS-B decoded messages, including fields for various BDS codes and ADS-B type codes.

Messages.name: Messages

messages.description: An array of Mode-S and ADS-B decoded message records.

Messages.description: A container for multiple Mode-S and ADS-B decoded messages.

schema.name: Messages
schema.doc: A container for multiple Mode-S and ADS-B decoded messages.

fields.name: messages
